name: IntroDB Skip
description: Automatically skip TV show intros using IntroDB and IntroHater.
overview: Sync intro markers from IntroDB and IntroHater APIs to support skip intro workflows.

versions.changelog: V2.2.1 - Fixed marker leakage, next-episode pre-fetching, and IMDb resolution. Consolidating stability for Android Auto-Skip.
V2.2.0 - Added Chapter Injection. Intros now appear as chapters in the timeline for Android support. Added toggle in settings.
